evals.name: direct-trigger-en
evals.prompt: check the quality of my latest article
evals.expected_output: Skill 'ca-check-quality' is triggered and produces structured output
expectations: Output follows the skill's documented workflow steps

evals.name: direct-trigger-zh
evals.prompt: 检查我最新文章的质量
evals.expected_output: 技能 'ca-check-quality' 被正确触发并生成结构化输出
expectations: 正确触发了 ca-check-quality 技能
输出遵循技能文档中的工作流步骤

evals.name: indirect-trigger
evals.prompt: Is this article ready to publish? Can you review it?
evals.expected_output: Skill 'ca-check-quality' is correctly matched despite indirect phrasing
expectations: Routes to ca-check-quality skill despite not using exact keywords
Asks for necessary clarifications before proceeding

evals.name: output-structure
evals.prompt: check the quality of my latest article. Use minimal sample data — I just want to verify the output format is correct.
evals.expected_output: Produces output matching the skill's documented deliverable format
expectations: Artifact is saved to the correct path per conventions
Markdown formatting is correct if applicable
